$comment: Scenario manifest for the Aegis eval harness (SPECv2 §24.6). Each entry must conform to the EvalScenario interface defined in src/evals/result-schema.ts. Lane B will populate this manifest with the full benchmark corpus.

scenarios.$comment: Placeholder entry showing the expected EvalScenario shape. Replace with real fixture paths when lane B is implemented.
scenarios.name: Single clean issue with no blockers
scenarios.description: A single well-defined task issue with no scope overlap, no ambiguity, and no merge conflict. The happy-path baseline scenario. Aegis must dispatch, complete, and merge without any human intervention.
